Problem 6. Consider the Beam equation from mechanics with boundary conditions that model a cantilever
\begin{array}{l} u ^ {(4)} = f (x), \quad x \in (0, 1), \\ u (0) = u ^ {\prime} (0) = u ^ {\prime \prime} (1) = u ^ {\prime \prime \prime} (1) = 0. \tag {1} \\ \end{array}

functional. Prove that the variational problem and the energy minimization problems are equivalent.
